title: Database Slow Query Causing Latency Cascade

alert.title: Latency spike across multiple services
alert.message: Multiple services reporting elevated p99 latency. user-service p99=4200ms, payment-service p99=3500ms. SLO breach detected.

logs: 2024-03-28 15:09:45 [INFO] Incoming request rate: 1,247 req/s (normal range)
2024-03-28 15:10:00 [WARN] Response time for /api/users exceeding SLO (p99 > 2000ms, current: 4200ms)
2024-03-28 15:10:05 [WARN] Response time for /api/payments exceeding SLO (p99 > 2000ms, current: 3500ms)
2024-03-28 15:10:10 [INFO] Upstream latency breakdown: user-service=1800ms, payment-service=2500ms
2024-03-28 15:10:15 [WARN] 15% of requests timing out at 5s gateway limit
2024-03-28 15:10:20 [WARN] SLO breach: p99 latency > 2000ms for 5 consecutive minutes
2024-03-28 15:09:30 [WARN] Database query took 4.2s: SELECT * FROM users WHERE last_login > '2024-03-01'
2024-03-28 15:09:45 [WARN] Connection pool exhaustion warning: 48/50 active connections to db-primary
2024-03-28 15:10:00 [ERROR] Request timeout after 5000ms for GET /api/users/profile
2024-03-28 15:10:02 [WARN] Database query took 3.8s: SELECT u.*, s.* FROM users u JOIN sessions s ON u.id = s.user_id
2024-03-28 15:10:10 [ERROR] 22% of requests failing due to database timeouts
2024-03-28 15:10:15 [WARN] Falling back to stale cache for user profile data
2024-03-28 15:09:35 [WARN] Transaction processing delayed: DB response time 3.5s (expected <100ms)
2024-03-28 15:09:50 [ERROR] Payment timeout for order #78234 - DB connection wait exceeded 4s
2024-03-28 15:10:00 [WARN] 18 payment retries queued in last 30s
2024-03-28 15:10:05 [WARN] Retry queue growing: 127 pending transactions
2024-03-28 15:10:10 [ERROR] Circuit breaker OPEN for db-primary connection pool
2024-03-28 15:10:15 [ERROR] Payment processing suspended: cannot acquire DB connection within timeout
2024-03-28 15:08:00 [INFO] Autovacuum started on table: user_sessions (estimated 4.8M dead tuples)

2024-03-28 15:09:00 [WARN] Slow query detected (45.2s): SELECT u.*, s.*, o.* FROM users u JOIN sessions s ON u.id = s.user_id JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE s.last_active > '2024-03-01' ORDER BY o.created_at DESC
2024-03-28 15:09:01 [WARN] Query plan: Sequential scan on orders (estimated rows: 2.4M, no usable index on orders.user_id)
2024-03-28 15:09:10 [WARN] Active connections: 95/100 - approaching maximum
2024-03-28 15:09:20 [WARN] Slow query detected (38.7s): same query pattern repeating from user-service pool
2024-03-28 15:09:30 [WARN] Lock contention on table: orders (15 queries waiting for row-level locks)
2024-03-28 15:09:45 [ERROR] Connection pool saturated: 100/100 connections in use, 12 queries waiting
2024-03-28 15:10:00 [WARN] Checkpoint taking longer than expected: 45s (threshold: 30s)
2024-03-28 15:10:10 [ERROR] New connection refused: too many clients already (max_connections=100)
2024-03-28 15:05:00 [WARN] Eviction policy triggered: 1,247 keys evicted (allkeys-lru)
2024-03-28 15:07:00 [WARN] Memory usage at 85% of maxmemory limit (3.4GB/4.0GB)
2024-03-28 15:09:00 [INFO] Cache hit rate: 67% (down from 82% baseline due to evictions)
2024-03-28 15:10:00 [WARN] Eviction rate elevated: 45 keys/sec (normal: 5 keys/sec)
2024-03-28 15:10:10 [INFO] Most evicted key patterns: user:session:*, user:profile:*

root_cause.description: An unindexed query joining users, sessions, and orders tables is causing sequential scans on 2.4M rows, saturating the database connection pool and causing cascading latency across all dependent services

args.query: CREATE INDEX idx_orders_user_created ON orders(user_id, created_at)
